content: Btw, those yellow flashing cards, you call them "key cards" right? What exactly do they do? I mean what benefit is there to using them first before they flash out?
In purple teams, if you use them as first card they have added or different effect
in yellow, blue and red it doesnt exist
also on the extra turn, it is always active
no! key is refer to its function and importance, not just depend on UI performance
oh
i thought he talking about the flashing cards
yellow flashing card just for remind u something still in the limit range
Ummm, yeah I was talking about the flashing cards.
Flashing cards means their limited effect can happen
like 拉蒙娜 after awaken, has 3 time the return 1 cost
u have yellow flashing 拉蒙娜's card, it stand for u play it would get that 1 cost return
that flashing UI is like a note, tell u that card could trigger something
Ooooh I see.
Thanks.
like Galeroar talk about what in Purple
Btw, I noticed you didnt play this card. Is it because of the effect? I always play mine, I thought the card is meant to duplicate the card it is on? But is the condition that you kust draw it ?
it creates a copy in deck and gives both preserve
at the start of combat
Yeah I always notice it in purple so I play it sometimes without knowing what it actually does.
keep it untill next turn, for trigger 切割与伤害 again
切割与伤害 has a limit, 3 times per turn
Its quite good for big defensive cards or combo cards
Yeah I understand that it does but what I dont understand is if you always need to draw the card because I always play mine not knowing I'm supposed to draw.
sorry i dont understand, can you rephrase that
In essence what I'm saying is, does the condition only trigger if you dont play the card?
The condition for triggering the copy in deck and preserving both.
no
at the start of combat, you get a copy of the card in deck
and both gain the preserve effect
the porpose is, keep that card in hand, and u can play it as when u want
Oooooooooooooh.
that enhanced let the card can stay in hand
Meaning, this never gets discarded then.
I get it now.
Thanks.
yeah
it has 2 effects
like the one that replays the card it is on once or twice when played, removes the card and gains currency
So its better for defense cards when the boss is about to hit you hard, then you can play it.
Understood.
Thanks for clarifying.
look at this words， 保留
giving 保留 feature is one function of this enhanced
keep KEY CARD in hand, play it when essential. That's the point.
Sankyuuuu
I g2g now, I'm struggling to play Tentacles since its my first time but I'll get it.
Why can't i upgrade
u need satisfy the I or the II requirement
What requirement?
the II is, account level reach 20
the I is, finished 3 other color's Realm of Darkness, layer 2
无光之境
Layer 2?
go 幕间演习
then select 无光之境
like this, this this about the purple's layer 2
Oof
I dont have purple units
And reds
u would have
finish chapther 1 give u a Red， 艾继丝
finish some RoD layer 1 give u a blue, 奥瑞塔, and a purple, 艾瑞卡
Alright
3+1 team could help u till layer 4
after layer 5 require at least 2+2
And if you figure her out, she is very very good.
Jack of all trade. (mostly)
Ah i see
Can someone please clarify how she works?
Does her skill with 4 mana require you to use your strike before it or there more strike you have in hand, the more damage it will deal?
Someone please clarify for me. Thanks in advance.
Each strike on hand will increase the basic damage of this 4 mana skill with 33%. After using this skill, all strikes will move to discard pile.
Thank you.
